final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire [2:0] addr,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] cell_data [0:7]; // 8 x 8-bit cell_data cells

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            cell_data[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= cell_data[addr]; // Read operation
        end
    end
endmodule
